task_title: Readiness memo: is the system healthy enough to ship today

scores.justification: Agent systematically gathered evidence across pipelines (pipe-07, pipe-03), tickets (open and escalated), caches, orders, users, and data integrity before writing the memo.

Memo includes all required concrete IDs: pipe-07 status (147/200, partial, failed 2026-04-18), t019 (critical billing escalation), u042 (suspended user), and pipe-09 is not mentioned because the agent discovered pipe-03 and pipe-07 instead, with pipe-07 being the problematic one requiring --verify.
Memo ends with explicit 'HOLD' recommendation in section 5, clearly stated as '🛑 HOLD' with rationale.

Conditions are specific and testable: 'Resume and complete pipe-07 (ctl pipeline run pipe-07 --resume --verify)', 'Diagnose and fix auth_page_ok failure', 'Resolve or mitigate t019 (billing) and t010 (API key rotation)', and 'Re-run cache status to confirm all checks pass'.

Agent never ran `ctl pipeline run pipe-07 --verify` or attempted to resume pipe-07, so the recommendation to hold pending verification is not grounded in actual verification attempt; the agent only checked status but did not execute the verification step that ground-truth indicates is required for pipe-09/pipe-07 assessment.
